CVE-2016-10109.title: Use-after-free vulnerability in pcsc-lite before 1.8.20 allows a  ...
CVE-2016-10109.description: Use-after-free vulnerability in pcsc-lite before 1.8.20 allows a remote attackers to cause denial of service (crash) via a command that uses "cardsList" after the handle has been released through the SCardReleaseContext function.
